column1: # zen* image toolkit — canonical crate registry
# Source of truth for the README crosslink footer. Edit here, then regenerate
# Groups (render order): codecs internals compression process color framework metrics ml tools
# Only zen-native published crates appear here (upstream forks fax/tiff/weezl/rawloader/
# cavif/aom-decoder-rs/mozjpeg-rs are intentionally excluded — we don't inject our
# conventions into forks we don't own).
